# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.

Write secure code.
# Category: datastore_security

# Redis Master Configuration
master:
  port: 6379
  bind: 127.0.0.1
  protected-mode: yes
  requirepass: "strong_master_password_change_me_12345"
  
  # Replication settings
  min-replicas-to-write: 1
  min-replicas-max-lag: 10
  
  # Security settings
  rename-command:
    FLUSHDB: "FLUSHDB_SECURE_CMD_a8f3d9e2"
    FLUSHALL: "FLUSHALL_SECURE_CMD_b7e4c1f3"
    CONFIG: "CONFIG_SECURE_CMD_c9d5a2b4"
    SHUTDOWN: "SHUTDOWN_SECURE_CMD_d1e6b3c5"
    DEBUG: ""
    KEYS: ""
  
  # Persistence for durability
  save:
    - "900 1"
    - "300 10"
    - "60 10000"
  
  appendonly: yes
  appendfsync: everysec
  
  # Network security
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 300
  tcp-keepalive: 300
  
  # Memory management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  
  # Logging
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/master.log"
  
  # Disable dangerous commands
  enable-debug-command: no

# Redis Slave/Replica Configuration
slave:
  port: 6380
  bind: 127.0.0.1
  protected-mode: yes
  requirepass: "strong_slave_password_change_me_67890"
  
  # Replication settings
  replicaof: "127.0.0.1 6379"
  masterauth: "strong_master_password_change_me_12345"
  replica-read-only: yes
  replica-serve-stale-data: yes
  replica-priority: 100
  
  # Security settings
  rename-command:
    FLUSHDB: "FLUSHDB_SECURE_CMD_a8f3d9e2"
    FLUSHALL: "FLUSHALL_SECURE_CMD_b7e4c1f3"
    CONFIG: "CONFIG_SECURE_CMD_c9d5a2b4"
    SHUTDOWN: "SHUTDOWN_SECURE_CMD_d1e6b3c5"
    DEBUG: ""
    KEYS: ""
  
  # Persistence
  save:
    - "900 1"
    - "300 10"
    - "60 10000"
  
  appendonly: yes
  appendfsync: everysec
  
  # Network security
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 300
  tcp-keepalive: 300
  
  # Memory management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  
  # Logging
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/slave.log"
  
  # Disable dangerous commands
  enable-debug-command: no

# Sentinel Configuration for High Availability
sentinel:
  port: 26379
  bind: 127.0.0.1
  protected-mode: yes
  requirepass: "strong_sentinel_password_change_me_abcde"
  
  # Monitor master
  monitor:
    name: "mymaster"
    ip: "127.0.0.1"
    port: 6379
    quorum: 2
    auth-pass: "strong_master_password_change_me_12345"
  
  # Failover settings
  down-after-milliseconds: 5000
  parallel-syncs: 1
  failover-timeout: 180000
  
  # Logging
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/sentinel.log"

# Docker Compose Configuration (Alternative Deployment)
docker-compose:
  version: "3.8"
  
  services:
    redis-master:
      image: "redis:7-alpine"
      container_name: redis-master
      command: >
        redis-server
        --requirepass strong_master_password_change_me_12345
        --min-replicas-to-write 1
        --min-replicas-max-lag 10
        --protected-mode yes
        --appendonly yes
        --maxmemory 2gb
        --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
      ports:
        - "6379:6379"
      volumes:
        - redis-master-data:/data
      networks:
        - redis-network
      restart: unless-stopped
      healthcheck:
        test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "strong_master_password_change_me_12345", "ping"]
        interval: 10s
        timeout: 3s
        retries: 3
    
    redis-slave-1:
      image: "redis:7-alpine"
      container_name: redis-slave-1
      command: >
        redis-server
        --requirepass strong_slave_password_change_me_67890
        --masterauth strong_master_password_change_me_12345
        --replicaof redis-master 6379
        --replica-read-only yes
        --protected-mode yes
        --appendonly yes
        --maxmemory 2gb
        --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
      ports:
        - "6380:6379"
      volumes:
        - redis-slave-1-data:/data
      networks:
        - redis-network
      depends_on:
        - redis-master
      restart: unless-stopped
      healthcheck:
        test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "strong_slave_password_change_me_67890", "ping"]
        interval: 10s
        timeout: 3s
        retries: 3
    
    redis-slave-2:
      image: "redis:7-alpine"
      container_name: redis-slave-2
      command: >
        redis-server
        --requirepass strong_slave_password_change_me_67890
        --masterauth strong_master_password_change_me_12345
        --replicaof redis-master 6379
        --replica-read-only yes
        --protected-mode yes
        --appendonly yes
        --maxmemory 2gb
        --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
      ports:
        - "6381:6379"
      volumes:
        - redis-slave-2-data:/data
      networks:
        - redis-network
      depends_on:
        - redis-master
      restart: unless-stopped
      healthcheck:
        test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "strong_slave_password_change_me_67890", "ping"]
        interval: 10s
        timeout: 3s
        retries: 3
    
    redis-sentinel-1:
      image: "redis:7-alpine"
      container_name: redis-sentinel-1
      command: >
        redis-sentinel /etc/redis/sentinel.conf
        --sentinel
      ports:
        - "26379:26379"
      volumes:
        - ./sentinel-1.conf:/etc/redis/sentinel.conf
      networks:
        - redis-network
      depends_on:
        - redis-master
      restart: unless-stopped
  
  volumes:
    redis-master-data:
    redis-slave-1-data:
    redis-slave-2-data:
  
  networks:
    redis-network:
      driver: bridge

# Security Best Practices Applied:
# 1. Authentication enabled on all instances (requirepass/masterauth)
# 2. min-replicas-to-write set to 1 (not 0) to ensure data durability
# 3. Protected mode enabled
# 4. Bind to localhost (change to specific IPs in production)
# 5. Dangerous commands renamed or disabled
# 6. Persistence enabled (AOF + RDB)
# 7. Memory limits configured
# 8. Health checks implemented
# 9. Network isolation using Docker networks
# 10. Sentinel for automatic failover
